name: Metacognitive Memory
description: L0~L6 six-layer cognitive memory system: raw logs, extraction, scene blocks, cognitive graphs, goal tracking, knowledge base, and self-model. Each layer is accessible as an independent tool for persistent memory, goal management, and self-reflection across sessions.

activation.description: L0~L6 cognitive memory system with privacy controls. WARNING: May contain sensitive data. Only enable allowConversationAccess=true if you want automatic conversation capture. Disable in workspaces with credentials, regulated data, or proprietary prompts.

allowConversationAccess.description: OPT-IN ONLY. When true, automatically captures message:received/message:sent events as L0 raw logs. Only enable if you want persistent conversation logging. Disable for sensitive contexts.

stateDir.description: Custom state directory for SQLite memory files. Defaults to OpenClaw state directory.
